headline: Ventas: Ahead Of Q2 Results, Lots To Like About This Senior-Care REIT
summary: Ventas REIT analysis: senior housing tailwinds, strong balance sheet and dividend coverage, but pricey 23x P/E limits upside. Click for more on VTR stock.
